message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor User as User
participant "Index" as Index
participant "User\nController" as UC
database "Database" as DB

User -> Index : GET: /users/signup
Index -> UC : renderSignup()
UC -> UC : render(index)
Index <-- UC
User <-- Index : display signup
User -> Index : POST: /users/signup
Index -> Index : async signup()
Index -> UC
UC -> DB : User.findOne(email)

alt [user not found]
    DB --> UC : return false
    alt [accept]
        UC -> UC : User.create()
        User <-- Index : display home
    else [refuse]
        User <-- Index : display home
    end
else [user already exist]
    User <-- Index : show error
end

@enduml
```
